task: weak-spot #2 — root-cause the '~3 %' coil-gradient adjoint honest-limit

method.adjoint: jax.grad through the custom_vjp implicit-diff adjoint (Jacobi-preconditioned BiCGSTAB)
method.fd: central FD, WARM-STARTED from the base solution (psi_init=psi_base) to stay in-basin

measurements.note: FD TRUNCATION artefact — a 3 kA step is a ~0.5 % coil perturbation and the axis flux is nonlinear at that scale; this is the origin of the historical '~3 %/few-percent' honest-limit figure

conclusion: the coil-current adjoint gradient is EXACT (agreement to ~7 significant figures at eps=100-300 A on both a strong and a weak coil); the historical honest-limit was an FD-methodology artefact, not an adjoint error
